zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡偏多格局延续
zh.content:
当前ADA/USD处于窄幅震荡上行结构，价格稳站0.152上方，短线动能偏多但波动收敛，市场进入整理蓄势阶段延续上行倾向。

MACD指标为正且柱体扩张，显示多头动能仍在释放，但RSI缺失使超买判断受限，短期需观察动能持续性MACD多头占优。

下方支撑位关注0.1510与0.1480附近，上方阻力集中在0.1530与0.1550区域，当前价格接近压力带上沿。

交易策略上建议以回踩低位分批做多为主，跌破0.1510需警惕回调延伸；若突破0.1530则有望测试更高区间。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is currently in a narrow consolidation phase after a gradual recovery from lower levels. Price action remains tightly compressed between 0.1511 and 0.1528, suggesting equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The market structure leans mildly bullish as higher lows are forming on intraday charts. Trading above the 20-period SMA reinforces short-term strength, though momentum remains limited due to low volatility and absence of a decisive breakout catalyst.

Indicator readings support a cautiously constructive outlook. The price holding above the 20-period SMA at 0.14807 signals underlying bullish bias in the short term. MACD remains slightly positive at 0.00176, indicating weak but persistent upward momentum. However, without RSI data, momentum confirmation is incomplete, so price action and volume behavior become more important for assessing continuation versus a potential range-bound correction phase.

Immediate support is anchored at the 20-period SMA near 0.14807, which also aligns with prior intraday demand zones. A deeper support area sits around 0.145, where buyers previously re-entered the market. On the upside, resistance is clearly defined at the recent high of 0.15284. A sustained break above this level could open the path toward 0.155 and beyond if momentum accelerates.

Trading conditions favor short-term range strategies while awaiting a volatility expansion. Buying near support around 0.148–0.150 may offer favorable risk-reward setups, with protective stops below 0.145. For breakout traders, confirmation above 0.15284 is required before targeting 0.155 or higher. Until a decisive breakout occurs, cautious position sizing and disciplined exits are recommended due to the market’s compressed range behavior and ongoing monitoring of volume confirmation signals.
